title: Terms and Conditions

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.content: By accessing, browsing, posting a service or subscribing to a plan on Atlas Services, you accept these Terms and Conditions in full. If you disagree, do not use the platform.

sections.title: 2. Nature of the service
sections.content: Atlas Services is a digital directory to connect people with local service providers (electricians, plumbers, carpenters, IT technicians, etc.). We are not intermediaries, we do not participate in contracts, we do not charge commissions for work, nor do we guarantee the quality, legality, safety or results of services rendered. All responsibility rests directly between the provider and the client.

sections.title: 3. Publishing and Premium plans
items: Premium plans (1, 3, 6 or 12 months) are paid and grant search priority, "Pro" badge and greater visibility.
Payments: Processed securely through certified payment gateways. Payment is exclusively for advertising and positioning.
Cancellation and refunds: You can let the plan expire. No refunds are made for unused periods once the service has started. For early cancellations, contact support.

sections.title: 4. User obligations
items: Provide truthful, accurate and up-to-date information.
Have the necessary legal permits for your trade.
Not publish illegal, fraudulent content or content that infringes third-party rights.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Atlas Services shall not be liable for damages, losses, claims or problems arising from the use of the platform, transactions or services between users.

sections.title: 6. Modifications and termination
sections.content: We may modify these terms (we will notify you by email or on the site). We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts for serious breaches, without refund on paid plans.

footer: Thank you for being part of this initiative. We're all here to help each other!
